title: [FIRRTL] Suspected incorrect memory mask lowering for aggregate partial write with dynamic subaccess

features.name: aggregate memory instance with concatenated per-bit write mask
features.description: Code should include a memory module instantiation with concatenated write data and per-bit write mask ports for an aggregate-typed memory

features.name: bit-granular masked memory write in sequential always block
features.description: Code should include a sequential always block that writes individual bits of a memory array conditionally based on a per-bit write mask

features.name: aggregate memory partial write mask with dynamic sub-field index
features.description: Code should include write mask generation for an aggregate memory where a dynamically-selected element of an array subfield is partially written and the per-element mask is concatenated with adjacent field masks
